params.description: Visual indicator draws showing difference between Glue Sticks (55) and Markers (30) bars.

steps.text: Here's how to find it. Glue Sticks is at 55. Markers is at 30. To find how many MORE, we subtract: 55 minus 30 equals 25. The answer is 25.
